query:
-- الحصول على ID وتفاصيل admin
SELECT 
  id, 
  username, 
  email,
  role,
  accountStatus, 
  DATE_FORMAT(trialEndDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as trialEndDate,
  DATE_FORMAT(subscriptionEndDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as subscriptionEndDate,
  DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as current_time
FROM users 
WHERE email = 'admin@radius-pro.com' OR username = 'admin'
LIMIT 1;
